section_desc: If any person, dishonestly or fraudulently, does any act referred to in section 43, he shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which may extend to three years or with fine which may extend to five lakh rupees or with both.

section_title: Punishment for publishing or transmitting obscene material in electronic form
section_desc: Whoever publishes or transmits or causes to be published or transmitted in the electronic form, any material which is lascivious...
